_publications._publicationTitle: Nf2/Merlin controls spinal cord neural progenitor function in a Rac1/ErbB2-dependent manner.

_contextSnippet: Similar results were also obtained using a dominant-negative Rac1 (Rac1 N17) molecule...Genetic Rac1 inhibition (Rac1 N17 expression) reduces Nf2−/− NPC neurosphere diameters to WT levels
details: Genetic Rac1 inhibition using dominant-negative Rac1 (Rac1 N17) reduced Nf2−/− NPC neurosphere diameters to WT levels
